text.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuned Model Production Deployment — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: At which ramp step is the deployment currently?

branch.when: ramp_step == 10 AND metrics_ok == true AND hold_elapsed_h >= 24
branch.question: Are metrics at next ramp step healthy?

branch.when: ramp_step == 50 AND metrics_ok == true AND hold_elapsed_h >= 48

branch.conclusion: Deployment complete. Cost-watch alert remains active.
Rollback. Revert router to 0% fine-tune. Incident post-mortem.

example.p: Ramp at 10% for 24h, accuracy 88% (eval baseline 68%, ft 88% — match), latency p95 within budget → promote to 50%.
